_comment: Declarative warehouse tuning for the Gold layer. The Python loader reads only the functional keys it knows, so these _comment fields document the intent without changing runtime behavior.

default._comment: Default storage strategy applied to every Gold table unless a dataset-specific override is defined below.

partition_range._comment: Range partitioning matches the analytical grain of the IMF time-series datasets and keeps year-based scans efficient in BigQuery.

datasets._comment: Per-dataset overrides keyed by parquet stem / logical dataset name.

countries._comment: The countries reference table is a scaffold rather than a time-series fact table, so partitioning is disabled while clustering on country remains useful.
